sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, description String);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'number: 10, number: 20, number: 30');
UPDATE test_table SET description = extract(description, '\\d+') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, extract(description, '\\d+') AS extracted_number FROM test_table;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (2, 'value: 100, value: 200, value: 300');
